code.description: Stable code within the set, e.g. `NC_TEMP_IMPORT`.

effective.description: Row-level effective window; defaults to the set's window when absent.

deprecated.description: A deprecated row is not `live`: it cannot be the target of a codeRef (§9.4).

codeRefs.description: Foreign-key columns keyed by column name (e.g. `country` → countries

description: One code row. `codeRefs` are foreign-key-like columns into other CodeSets (§9.4).
